chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.943 of 2023 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Khalid Hussain Shahani Applicant:- Tahir Muhammad Mateen and two others through Mr. Kashif Khan Tanoli, advocate. Respondents No. 1-3:- Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General. Respondents No.4 & 5:- Abdul Latif Rind & Muhammad Hanif through Mr. Muhammad Farooq, advocate. Respondent No. 6:- Razzaullah Qalandarni through Mr. Sikandar Zulqernain, advocate. Date of hearing:- 27.04.2026 =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: After arguing at some length, learned defence counsel does not press this application and submits that he will examine all the witnesses and if is prima facie successful in establishing ingredients of sections 6 and 7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997 will move fresh application for consideration. This proposal has not been opposed by other side and this application is therefore disposed of in above terms along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
